message:
feat(content): add Chat to File project and fix Twitter meta

Content additions:
- Add chat_shared_conversation_to_file project (20 stars)
- Converts ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok share links to Markdown/HTML
- Tags: CLI, Agents, Markdown, Conversion, DevTools

Twitter metadata fix:
- Add twitter:site property (@doodlestein) per Twitter guidelines
- Reorder twitter metadata for clarity (site before creator)
